/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libdirect_lidar_inertial_odometry__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libdirect_lidar_inertial_odometry__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/direct_lidar_inertial_odometry__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/direct_lidar_inertial_odometry/srv/detail/save_pcd__description.c.o CMakeFiles/direct_lidar_inertial_odometry__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/direct_lidar_inertial_odometry/srv/detail/save_pcd__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/direct_lidar_inertial_odometry__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/direct_lidar_inertial_odometry/srv/detail/save_pcd__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
